summary: Nursing students will practice basic conversations between nurses and hospital patients in English and learn important nursing vocabulary
aims: This course will focus on English language, information, and skills needed by people going into a nursing career. Students will learn the English needed in on the job nursing, and will practice language in real work simulations. Students will also learn the specialist vocabulary of nursing.
goals: Students should be able to talk about hospital jobs, places in the hospital, responsibilites of hospital personnel
to describe first aid procedures and symptoms of illness
to be able to talk about their work and/or training as nurses; interviewing skills
textbooks: Bedside Manner Beginner 3版（9784939130243で検索すること）
prereq: Students are expected to be familiar with basic English grammar and willing to participate actively in classroom activities.
prep: Homework exercises and quizzes on the Moodle site
teachers: ◎ ロバートソン マイケル

extra.label: 成績評価に関する補足
extra.text:
In addition to attending at least 2/3 of the classes, students must score a total of 60% in order to pass the course. Assessment will be based on the following factors：
1. Attendance and class participation：10%
2. Quizzes 30%
3. Review Test 20%
4. Final Exam 40%
